content_of_post_to_answer: Why am I shy in front of girls?
answer: Being shy in front of girls is often less about girls themselves and more about the pressure you attach to the interaction. When you see someone as a test of your worth, your mind shifts from connecting to performing, which creates anxiety. The goal is not to become fearless but to stop treating every conversation as a judgment. I've written more about this pattern on my profile for anyone who wants to explore it further. Confidence grows when you stop trying to prove yourself and start trying to understand the person in front of you.
